content: Fork just_audio (sagarchaulagai @ a6f8db8): _processingStateSubject is BehaviorSubject<ProcessingState>.seeded(ProcessingState.idle) — NO sync:true, so async delivery. processingStateStream = _processingStateSubject.stream.distinct(). BehaviorSubject replays current value to new listeners on next microtask. .distinct() passes first value always. So new listener ALWAYS receives current processingState (on next microtask), then subsequent transitions. Cannot miss ready transition if state changes after listen. BUT: if state is already ready when listener attaches, listener receives ready immediately (redundant play call — no-op since playing already true). Fork includes 'Fix bug on simultaneous loads' (bf26a62) which changed 130 lines in just_audio.dart — _pluginLoadRequest interruption mechanism. setAudioSources immediately marks existing load as interrupted (line 892).
